// Redirect all CTA buttons to Telegram setTimeout(function() { document.addEventListener('click', function(e) { var target = e.target; while (target && target !== document.body) { if (target.tagName === 'A' || target.tagName === 'BUTTON' || target.getAttribute('role') === 'button') { e.preventDefault(); window.location.href = 'https://t.me/m/AwidoA2nOWUy'; return; } target = target.parentElement; } }, true); }, 100);
